scripts.env:check: npm run build --workspace @agentdocs/config && node -e "require('./packages/config/dist').loadEnvironment(); console.log('Environment configuration is valid')"
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && node --test packages/agent-runtime/dist/index.test.js packages/change-model/dist/index.test.js packages/config/dist/index.test.js packages/github-provider/dist/index.test.js packages/markdown-core/dist/index.test.js apps/api/dist/app.test.js
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
